message:
fix(planner): propagate INSERT conflict mode (OR REPLACE/IGNORE) in planner codegen

The planner codegen path hardcoded p5=0 (OE_ABORT) for the Insert
opcode, ignoring stmt.or_conflict. Add conflict_action_to_oe() and
OE_* constants, extract the conflict mode, and pass it through to
both codegen_insert_values and codegen_insert_select Insert opcodes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
